subject: Imperio — a Divine General character from Final Fantasy Legends, an elaborately dressed pale figure with ornate feathered-and-jeweled shoulder adornments holding a jeweled staff
description: A slender, pale humanoid figure stands facing slightly to the left in an elaborate white and cream ensemble. The most distinctive element is the massive layered fan-like shoulder ornament that cascades in purple, red, and multicolor jeweled tiers on both sides, resembling ornate wings or peacock feathers. The figure holds a long staff or scepter topped with a cluster of colorful gems and beads. White gloves on the hands. The face is sharp-featured with a composed expression. Behind and overlapping the figure is a large translucent ghost-image of the same face in close-up, rendered in pale lavender-grey. The background is pale blue-grey. The art style is elaborate manga-influenced illustration.
foreground: elaborately robed pale figure with massive jeweled shoulder adornments and gem-topped staff
background: pale blue-grey with translucent ghost-face overlay
